title: salvia nemorosa subsp. nemorosa
intro: Salvia nemorosa subsp. nemorosa, also known as Woodland Sage or Blue Sage, is a subspecies of the perennial herb Salvia nemorosa, native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can be attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Salvia nemorosa subsp. nemorosa include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve cognitive function, and alleviate symptoms of menopausal hot flashes. Herbal preparations of Salvia nemorosa subsp. nemorosa include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and promote a good night's sleep.
